name: Movavi Video Suite 2025  Steam Edition
short_description: Your do-it-all video-making bundle: a video editor, media converter, screen recorder, and more. Handy video editing, file conversion, and screen recording. One-click AI tools: auto subtitles, noise removal, and more. Hundreds of filters, transitions, titles, overlays.
detailed_description:
Easily tackle any video project, whether it’s a highlight reel from your latest stream, a gameplay showcase for your team, or a collection of your most memorable in-game moments! Edit on the intuitive timeline, add auto subtitles in a click, record screencasts with full audio, and convert media files at blazing speeds. Take your videos to the next level with AI-powered tools and create content you’ll be excited to share.

What’s new

  • Create automatic subtitles in one click
Let AI quickly turn your speech into text and automatically create captions for your videos in almost any language. Just choose the font, text color, position – and you’re all set!



  • Hover to preview anything
Picking titles, transitions, and filters has never been easier! Simply hover your mouse over any effect to see it in action. You can also view your project files in the same way.



  • Enjoy smoother editing
Easily find the exact frame you need by moving your mouse over the video track – no need to click! Drag and drop clips between tracks to piece videos together quickly and precisely.



  • Seamlessly blend videos and photos
Overlay your videos, photos, and even frames effortlessly to produce different looks. Create stylish vlogs, cinematic highlight reels, or vibrant clips in just a couple of clicks.

  • Edit faster with cutting-edge tech
We’ve improved Fast Track HD acceleration and added native support for AV1 codec and ARM-based processors (M1, M2, and other M-series chips). Even if this is like a foreign language to you, all you need to know is that our Video Editor is now faster and smoother than ever before – that’s all that matters.

  • Other improvements and fixed issues
We’ve enhanced the program with a more streamlined design, making it easier and more enjoyable to use. The improved layout, better organization of key features, and visual enhancements ensure faster access to essential tools for creating videos and slideshows.

Highlights


  • Enjoy fast and smooth video creation
Movavi Video Suite offers a great balance between powerful features and ease of use. Dive into effortless editing with all the tools you need right at hand. Make frame-precise cuts, resize, and rearrange your footage in no time. Adjust colors, stabilize shaky clips, swap backgrounds, and add music or voice-overs.

  • Polish your content with awesome effects
Supercharge your videos with a choice of tons of creative, professionally designed effects – choose from neon, cyberpunk, glitch, and more. Add stickers for cool accents, transitions for smoother stories, overlays for extra style! Music, titles, intros, frames – dive right in and take your content from memorable to unforgettable.



  • Power up with AI
Movavi Video Suite comes packed with smart AI tools that make video editing even easier:
  • Automatic subtitle creation saves loads of time by generating captions for you in almost any language.
  • The AI denoiser automatically cleans up background noise in your audio, so you get clear sound without any hassle.
  • If you need to remove background, AI does it in just a few clicks – no green screen required!
  • With motion tracking, you can easily follow objects or people through your footage, making it a breeze to add text, effects, or animations that stay locked onto your moving subject.



Effortlessly capture your screens and the attention of your viewers. Create engaging video tutorials, craft epic game walkthroughs and strategy guides. Record super-clear how-to videos for your teammates and capture must-see live streams. Make your screencasts extra informative: highlight mouse and keyboard clicks, draw on videos in real time, and add a webcam feed to show who the real hero is.



Forget about fussing with formats: convert your videos, music, and images from and to any format in the blink of an eye. Compress large videos with no loss of quality to save space on your hard drive. Easily find and add subtitles for your favorite flicks. Upscale the resolution of your videos with AI to enjoy them on bigger screens.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
